name: @forgeax/engine-ecs
description: Archetype ECS framework (World/Entity/Component/Query/System/Schedule) for forgeax-engine. Ships the forgeax-engine-console-ecs plugin bin (kubectl 4th-path: entities / components / systems / resources / world).

fps.reason: library package, no runtime canvas; fps reported by apps

bench.reason: no perf-critical hot path bench in this package; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; smoke gate covered by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps
